summary: Comprehensive testing of CloseLoop B2B SaaS execution layer for sales calls. All core features tested and working: AI generation (follow-up emails, documents, CRM notes, tasks), approval workflow, and Data Vault document matching.

issues: Confidence badge shows truncated 'confidence' text instead of 'high confidence' when approved

backend: Login with valid credentials (POST /api/auth/login) - returns JWT token
Get current user (GET /api/auth/me) - returns user data
Get vault documents (GET /api/vault) - returns documents with intent triggers
Vault has seeded documents (Enterprise Pricing Sheet, SOC2 Certificate, Acme Corp Case Study)
Create call with transcript (POST /api/calls) - creates call and generates AI outputs
Get call detail with AI outputs - returns email_draft, documents, crm_notes, tasks, summary
Get user stats (GET /api/user/stats) - returns pending/sent counts
frontend: Landing page loads with marketing content
Login form works with valid credentials
Dashboard loads after login with stats and action items
Calls page lists calls with status badges
Call Review page displays all sections: Summary, Key Moments, Transcript, Email, Documents, CRM, Tasks
Documents section shows 3 matched vault documents (Enterprise Pricing Sheet, SOC2 Certificate, Acme Corp Case Study)
CRM section shows Deal Stage, Next Step, Notes, and expandable Call Insights
Tasks section shows 3 tasks with priority badges, assignees, and due dates
Edit email flow works (Edit -> modify -> Save & Approve)
Individual approve buttons work for all item types
Approve & Send All button approves all items and sets status to 'sent'
Data Vault page shows documents with tags and intent triggers

email_draft.notes: Generates professional follow-up email with subject and body, references matched documents

documents.notes: Matches documents from Data Vault based on trigger words in transcript. All 3 seeded documents matched correctly.

crm_notes.notes: Generates categorized CRM notes (pain_point, requirement, timeline, etc.) with Call Insights expandable section

tasks.notes: Generates post-call tasks with priorities (high/medium/low), assignees, and due dates

summary.notes: Generates concise executive summary of the call

approval_workflow_verified.individual_approvals: Working - email, documents, crm, tasks can be approved individually
approval_workflow_verified.edit_and_approve: Working - email and CRM can be edited before approval
approval_workflow_verified.approve_all: Working - Approve & Send All button approves all items and sets status to 'sent'

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Email sending (logs to console), CRM integration (simulated), Transcription service (manual paste)
seed_data_creation: 3 vault documents seeded: Enterprise Pricing Sheet, SOC2 Compliance Certificate, Acme Corp Case Study - all with appropriate intent triggers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. The Call Review page (THE HERO feature) has been thoroughly tested with the approval workflow. Document matching from Data Vault works correctly. AI outputs include all 4 sections (email_draft, documents, crm_notes, tasks). Gemini AI integration is working via Emergent LLM key.

additional_notes.ai_integration: Uses Gemini 3 Flash via Emergent Integration. Falls back to mock outputs if EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is not set or AI call fails.
additional_notes.document_matching: Documents are matched from Data Vault using trigger words in transcript. The system correctly identified SOC2, pricing, and case study mentions.
additional_notes.approval_first_workflow: All AI outputs require human approval before being sent. Status changes from 'pending' to 'sent' only after all items are approved.
